title: The Forge He Couldn't Light
summary: Kael started a sword for a young adventurer named Roa. She did not live to claim it. He needs the materials he never finished gathering, and the courage to lay it where it should rest.

objectives.description: Bring Kael 2 iron ore, 1 bone shard, and 1 moonpetal.
Lay the finished sword on Roa's grave in Mossbarrow Cairn.
